prompt: A mobile manipulator robot performs order picking in a warehouse. It identifies shelves via QR codes and must verify the item before grasping. If weight exceeds its maximum capacity, it must abort the pick and notify the supervisor. When humans are detected within 2 meters, speed is reduced to 0.3 m/s. If obstacle blocking persists longer than 10 seconds, the robot must request assistance. Eventually, all orders should be completed and reported.
constraints: PickerBot verifies item via QR before grasping
PickerBot aborts pick  when load exceeds limit
when load exceeds limit PickerBot notifies supervisor
PickerBot reduces speed to 0.3 m/s when human < 2 m
PickerBot requests help if obstacle persists > 10 s

classification.raw_text: {"pattern":"time_bounded_constraint","keywords":["PickerBot","requests help","obstacle persists","greater than 10 seconds","timeout"],"cues":[">","if","persists","10 s"],"trigger_text":"obstacle persists > 10 s","response_text":"PickerBot requests help"}

generation.raw_text: {"query":"A[] (Obstacle.persistent && not PickerBot.requested_help imply t <= 10)","explanation":"The English constraint means the system must not stay in a situation with a persisting obstacle for more than 10 seconds without PickerBot having requested help. The A[] operator enforces this invariant globally, and the implication ensures that whenever the condition holds, the elapsed time t is at most 10 seconds, meaning help must be requested by then.","confidence":0.86,"pattern_used":"time_bounded_constraint","operator_used":["A[]","imply"]}

The A[] operator enforces this invariant globally, and the implication ensures that whenever the condition holds, the elapsed time t is at most 10 seconds, meaning help must be requested by then.
